title: Preference Precision vs. Strength

runtime.expected_outcome: preference_strength scales C overall; precision scales observation likelihood. They are different axes -- recipe shows the distinction.

audiences.kid: Do you want the snack more? Or do you just see it more clearly? Two different knobs, two different outcomes.
audiences.real: Don't conflate preference strength with observation precision. Strength reshapes -ln p(o); precision reshapes p(o|s).
audiences.equation: Pragmatic(pi) grows with strength. Accuracy grows with precision. Cookbook sweeps both independently.
audiences.derivation: Preference strength scales the C vector; precision scales the log-likelihood. They enter G at different points: preference through the pragmatic term, precision through the KL term via accuracy.

orchestrate.objective: Disambiguate preference_strength and precision_vector in the bundle builder.
orchestrate.context: tiny_open_goal; sweep (strength, precision_vector scale) in a 3x3 grid.

credits: Parr, Pezzulo & Friston (2022), Active Inference, MIT Press (CC BY-NC-ND), Ch 4.
